name: platform-setup
description: Conversational, guardrailed setup of Alvera platform resources (datalakes, data sources, tools, action status updaters, AI agents, connected apps) via @alvera-ai/platform-sdk. Ships four skills: `guided` (general resource loop), `custom-dataset-creation` (onboard a generic table from a CSV/NDJSON sample with a compliance gate and column profiling), `DAC-upload` (push a file through a data-activation-client via upload-link + ingest-file), and `query-datasets` (scaffold a local PostgREST + React explorer for row-level verification).
